summary: Fix UCB cold-start explosion: add dampening factor for registry-sourced skills to prevent new skills from dominating selection. Dampening = min(1.0, usage_count/5) for source='registry', restores full UCB at usage_count=5+.

added: Method _getUCBDampeningFactor(skill) at lines 256-261: returns dampening factor for UCB exploration bonus
3 new test cases in selection.test.js: verify dampening behavior and proven skill ranking
modified: _applyUCB() method at lines 263-283: apply dampening to exploration bonus formula

notes: TDD cycle: RED (3 failing tests) → GREEN (implementation) → REFACTOR (extracted _getUCBDampeningFactor). All skill-rl-manager tests pass (15/15 including 3 new). No regressions. Fixes blocker #3 (UCB cold-start explosion). Non-registry skills unaffected (dampening=1.0 always).
